## ✨ Begin Your Journey

In a calm forest glade, upon a grand pool of reflection, you meet **Ducky**, a legendary creature of wisdom and clarity. With a gentle quack and a knowing look, **Ducky** gestures toward the path ahead.

As your guide through this magical adventure, **Ducky** will help you navigate the challenges that lie before you. Together with **Mona** and **Copilot**, you three will unite your powers to save the land of Codia.

### Show Ducky the path to software enlightenment!
